post.subject: My Body-clock is fucked
post.body: I only got up at 3:40pm today! The reason being because i didnt go to sleep until 5:30am!! In order for me to have the internet in my room i rely on the computer downstairs to be on. That computer currently isnt working, so mums laptop is in its place. Normally my parents turn the computer off when they go to bed because they cant sleep with the noise of it 'cos its right outside their bedroom. Well last night after watching Beavis and Butthead Do America i turned on the laptop on my way to my room. I then sat on my computer until 5:30, when i started getting slightly tired. Thats really one of the things i wish i could do; to be able to carry on a conversation with people with so long, people that i dont really know that well. Maybe sometime I got paid on Friday, and proceeded to spend about £90. HIM tickets, Drink, buses, Food, other random crap throughout the day. Most importantly is the HIM tickets. Definately going, looking forward to it! I got very drunk on Friday night. It was fun. I hadnt been drunk in a few months! Then i woke up on saturday with a massive hangover and had to make my way home and it was very hard. Then i was a bit late for work too. Until the next time...
